headline: Stanley Black & Decker Plant Closure And Governance Debate Prompt Valuation Review
summary: Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE:SWK) is closing its last manufacturing facility in New Britain, with significant workforce reductions tied to shifting product demand. The company cites changes in where and how its tools and industrial products are produced as it reworks its manufacturing footprint. At the same time, a shareholder proposal has been filed to separate the roles of Chairman and CEO, calling for an independent board chair. This governance proposal is expected to be discussed ahead...
